searchConfiguration.description: Each split selects the Strategy Spec using only the training window, then scores the selected spec on the later out-of-sample window.

strategySpec.description: LuxAlgo ICT/SMC long template: bullish structure event plus bullish liquidity-zone confirmation, reverse bearish structure exit.
